name: MirrorCode: AI can rebuild entire programs from behavior alone

description: arXiv:2606.30182v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: AI models are rapidly improving at autonomous coding, as shown by benchmark progress and one-off demonstrations such as AI implementing a C compiler. However, existing coding benchmarks tend to focus on shorter tasks, and one-off demonstrations are hard to compare systematically because they often have some human guidance, and are not standard...
author: Tom Adamczewski, David Owen, David Rein, Florian Brand, Giles Edkins, Allen Hart, Daniel O'Connell
